data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement for 'Email confirmations', which is explicitly stated in the linked use case. However, the prior steps do not provide any evidence of email confirmations being sent to customers after they book their appointments. The absence of this critical functionality indicates a gap in meeting the requirement, as the expected result of receiving an email confirmation is not documented in the evidence provided.
gaps: No evidence confirming that email confirmations are sent to customers after booking.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
